title: Acoustic Positioning System
desc: Full 2D acoustic positioning pipeline localizing a microphone via time-difference-of-arrival using cross-correlation, peak detection, and least-squares multilateration.

detail.summary: Full 2D acoustic positioning pipeline that localizes a microphone using time-difference-of-arrival from multiple beacon speakers.
detail.why: TDOA-based positioning is foundational for signal processing, sensor fusion, and location-aware systems.
detail.problem: Noise, reflections, and sampling jitter corrupt the cross-correlation peaks needed for accurate TDOA estimation.
detail.approach: Periodic cross-correlation, noise averaging, peak detection, least-squares multilateration. Validated on simulated and real mic recordings.
